warnings.description: test_app_main_importable does not assert docker build succeeded first; if nova-api:test image is stale or absent, the test may fail or produce a misleading error rather than a clear skip/dependency failure
warnings.fix: Add a fixture or ordering dependency so test_app_main_importable only runs after test_docker_build passes, or use pytest-depends / explicit image presence check.

warnings.description: PRD specifies 'docker compose down cleanly removes both containers and the postgres volume' but the compose file visible in the diff does not declare a named volume for the db service; without a named volume, 'docker compose down -v' removes the anonymous volume, which may surprise users expecting a named volume lifecycle.
warnings.fix: Add a named volume (e.g. 'pgdata') under services.db and declare it in a top-level 'volumes:' block so lifecycle is explicit.
